'''''InQuest Gamer'' 70''' was a CCG and roleplaying magazine published by [[Wizard Entertainment]] in [[February]] [[2001]]. It featured an article called "[[Basic Training]]" by [[Dan Joyce]], introducing [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]].

==New continuity==
===New characters===
*[[Rann Thrakan]] {{1st}}
*[[Rann Thrakan's Jedi Master]] {{1stm}}
